content: Users can upload several files in one action.

comment.text: This text explains that users can upload multiple files at once. It appears as a tooltip on a UI element (likely a button or label) within the Uploader component, providing helpful information about the file upload functionality. Translators should maintain the meaning of multiple file uploads in a single action.

usage.context:
place="right"
 tooltipContent={
 <Text fontSize="12px">
 {isFolderMode
 ? t("MultipleFoldersDescription")
 : t("MultipleFilesDescription")}
 </Text>
 }
 dataTestId="multiple_help_button"
 />
 </LabelGroup>
